name: Combustion Cascade
reasoning: V3 best adheres to the prompt with a gaunt figure in a proper lab coat, mechanical arms extending from the garment (visible as articulated appendages), goggles on wild hair, and a collapsing laboratory structure with cascading flames and electrical arcs. V1 has four distinct mechanical hands but lacks the lab coat detail and feels more anime-stylized. V2 has a cartoonish art style with glowing red eyes that deviates from the prompt's science-fantasy tone and shows mechanical claws rather than arms extending from the garment. V3 maintains the best balance of stylized digital illustration, dynamic composition, warm fire-tones with high contrast, and post-apocalyptic science-fantasy aesthetic while staying true to the character description.

artifacts_found.issue: Character design deviates from prompt - lacks proper lab coat, has four mechanical hands instead of arms extending from garment, overly anime-stylized rather than science-fantasy
Cartoonish art style with glowing red eyes contradicts prompt tone, mechanical claws rather than arms from garment, less adherence to science-fantasy aesthetic
